examples: Keppel Harbour was named after Captain Henry Keppel. Who was he?
Keppel Land is Asia's premier home developer with world-class iconic waterfront residences at Keppel Bay and Marina Bay in Singapore.
Together with Fort Siloso on the opposite Sentosa Island, it guarded the entrance to the harbours in Keppel Bay from the southern sea.
Vanke, China's largest developer by revenue, will buy the stake from Singapore's Keppel Land Ltd.
